subcodes.first_line: O Lord, my Lord of all existence, my Master and Sovereign of the unseen and the seen! With utmost helplessness and poverty I [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای رب و رب من فی الوجود و مالکی و مالک الغیب و الشهود انی بکل عجز ومسکنه و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the departed, @presence of; reunion with God, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
